data.type_of_description: On 13 October 2025, the FCA issued a Final Notice by which it imposed a financial penalty of £100,281 and a prohibition order against Mr Neil Sedgwick Dwane following his breach of Article 14 of UK MAR. Mr Dwane is no longer approved. https://www.fca.org.uk/publication/final-notices/final-notice-neil-sedgwick-dwane-2025.pdf
